query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS address TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resellerId INT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status ENUM('active', 'suspended', 'inactive') DEFAULT 'active',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS language ENUM('ar', 'en') DEFAULT 'ar',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS avatarUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL;

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS avatarUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL;
